title: Gisela Graham Halloween Pumpkin Stoneware Mug
features: Charming Halloween-themed stoneware mug by Gisela Graham, featuring a cheerful orange pumpkin design on white glazed ceramic, perfect for festive beverages
Generous 300ml capacity ideal for hot drinks, with a comfortable handle and practical round shape
Measures 12 cm in width and 9 cm in height, making it a perfectly sized mug for everyday use
description: Add a delightful touch of Halloween spirit to your beverage routine with this charming stoneware mug from Gisela Graham. Featuring a cheerful orange pumpkin design against a pristine white background, this mug brings festive fun to your morning coffee or evening tea. Crafted from durable stoneware with a glazed finish, this 300ml capacity mug is both practical and decorative. The round shape and comfortable handle make it perfect for daily use, whilst being dishwasher safe for convenient cleaning. Measuring 12cm in width and 9cm in height, this standard-sized mug is ideal for hot beverages. The high-quality stoneware construction ensures excellent heat retention for your favourite drinks. Whether you're celebrating the spooky season or simply fancy adding a playful accent to your mug collection, this Halloween-themed piece makes a perfect choice for both everyday use and seasonal decoration.
